title: verbascum × horakii
intro: Verbascum × horakii, also known as the Horak's mullein or Horak's mullein mulein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which have been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × horakii include its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × horakii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers and steeping them in hot water or combining them with other herbs.
